title: potentilla recta subsp. tenuisepala
intro: Potentilla recta subsp. tenuisepala, also known as a subspecies of the Potentilla recta plant, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Potentilla recta subsp. tenuisepala include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
